excerpt: An oral history of the Sisters of Mercy’s rise from Leeds clubs through their debut album and subsequent implosion.
title: Paint My Name in Black and Gold

excerpt: A college student visits the last man on an abandoned, kudzu-choked street and learns what lurks beneath the vines.
title: Where the Summer Ends

excerpt: A grief-stricken man sees visions of a flapper-era woman at his Tennessee cabin—and discovers he’s not the first.
title: In the Pines

excerpt: In 1780 London, William Blake finds himself swept into the Gordon Riots, only to discover the rioters’ enigmatic leader harbors a dark secret.
title: King Mob

excerpt: Five thirteen-year-old boys go hunting for a mysterious black Commodore in the local junkyard but discover the car—and their town—harbor darker secrets than they could have imagined.
title: Commodore
